candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and preferred top-line measure; candidate list contains it.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels as allowed.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs on the income statement.
Balance-sheet inventory component, not an income statement expense, so not suitable for COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the income-statement direct cost line; excluded balance-sheet inventory row.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead component and populated above operating profit.
Broad overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
R&D-specific line appears to be a subcomponent within other operating expenses, so adding it would risk double counting.
Could be overhead, but it appears to be a subcomponent under other operating expenses; prefer parent bucket to avoid double counting.
Dedicated R&D total appears in supplemental section below operating profit, so not ideal for SG&A selection.
Capitalized development spending is not SG&A expense.
Looks special/non-recurring and R&D-related, not a core SG&A bucket.
Balance-sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance-sheet gross intangible asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance-sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the main overhead buckets above operating profit and excluded subcomponents/totals that would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization line, not the core current-period R&D expense; should be excluded from XRD if a direct R&D expense exists.
Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization line, not direct R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D label exists but appears in supplemental section below operating profit; lower priority than the above-EBIT line.
Capitalized spending is not expense.
Possible R&D-related project cost but not as clean as a dedicated R&D line.
Balance-sheet asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Preferred the above-EBIT dedicated R&D line. Included the supplemental 'R&D Expenses' as fallback in case reporting label changes by year. Did not add a separate R&D row to XSGA because 'Other operating expenses' likely already contains 'Other R&D Expenses'.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; suitable fallback when specific interest expense is unavailable.
Most direct interest expense label and preferred first choice.
Too narrow/partial; not preferred over direct interest expense or total finance costs.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related but supplemental and lease-specific only.
Balancing row must not be used.
Balancing row must not be used.

variables.notes: Using direct interest expense first, with total financial expenses as fallback for years where the specific interest line is absent.

candidates.why: Not equity; compensation-related line on income statement.
Not book equity; compensation expense line.
Income statement profit attribution line, not balance-sheet equity.
Component of equity, not total owner equity.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner equity line exists.

variables.notes: The candidate list misses the best BE label. Chose 'Owners of the parent company' from the balance sheet because BE should exclude non-controlling interests to avoid double counting with MIB. Manual review flagged only because selection is outside the provided candidates. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Owners of the parent company

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred for MIB when balance-sheet line exists.
Income statement OCI allocation line, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet minority interest / NCI line; best match.
Equivalent balance-sheet label; useful fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list.
